BUY ON UNISWAP

Meet Tyler

Tyler is the fictional legendary character from Fatt Murie's Guys' Club comic. He is also a dancer and loves video games just as much as $BRETT.

Now he is living on the BASE blockchain as a fan tribute. He has become red mascot of the blue chain, BASE.

With a 100% fair launch zero insider allocations, Tyler aims to become the number one COMMUNITY meme on BASE. 

How to buy

Step 1: Download the Metamask wallet.

Step 2: Get ETH (Ethereum) tokens on BASE Network

Step 3: Open Uniswap

Step 4: Type the amount

Step 5: Swap for $TYLER
